blockingIssues.description: Prior blocking issue remains unresolved: `src/components/recipe-stream.tsx` still links to `/recipes/${savedRecipeId}` while no `/recipes/[id]` route exists in the repository, so direct URL access behavior is still unmet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure-reporting rules: if TDD ordering or agent-browser steps are skipped, workers must record deviations and cannot set `followedProcedure=true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple generation reviews (including fix-ideas-route-streaming and generation-cross-flows) observed missing required skill steps while handoff still reported full adherence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify accepted streaming response adapters by use case (e.g., `toUIMessageStreamResponse()` for chat UIs vs `toTextStreamResponse()` when paired with `useObject` structured streaming).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-ideas-route-streaming correctly uses `streamText` + `toTextStreamResponse()` with `experimental_useObject`, which conflicts with current blanket AGENTS guidance preferring `toUIMessageStreamResponse()`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align generation milestone acceptance criteria with implemented route availability, or add explicit dependency features before requiring `/recipes/[id]` direct-link behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: generation-full-recipe still references `/recipes/${savedRecipeId}` while `/recipes` detail routes are not present in the current codebase and are planned under conversion milestone.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated TDD-ordering mismatch observations from older review reports.
Clerk credential-source ambiguity for authenticated manual checks.

orchestratorOverride.justification: /recipes/[id] route is built by recipes-list-and-detail feature in the conversion milestone. The link in recipe-stream.tsx will work once that feature ships. This is expected milestone sequencing. All validators (102 tests, typecheck, lint) pass. Ideas streaming fix verified.
